## What & why

<!-- Describe the change and link the issue it resolves -->

Closes #

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New rule
- [ ] Rule enhancement
- [ ] Reporter / output
- [ ] Config / schema
- [ ] Docs & chore

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes (coverage gate ≥ 90%; all rules have fixture-based tests)
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] New rules include both a clean fixture (passes) and a dirty fixture (trips the rule)
- [ ] `.agentgate.yml` updated if new config options added
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior or config changed
